description: A live broadcast still labeled 'House Chamber' showing a woman with short dark hair and glasses, wearing pearls and a cream jacket with a 'RELEASE THE FILES' badge, seated with a neutral expression. A man in a suit sits to her left with head lowered. A chyron reads 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Delivers State of the Union Address' with 'REAL AMERICA'S VOICE' branding.
notable_text: House Chamber; RELEASE THE FILES; PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Delivers State of the Union Address
